name: Winds Over the Ice Barrier
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>結</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>に<ruby lang="jp"><rb>至</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いた</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>る<ruby lang="jp"><rb>晴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>嵐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: The Storm Clearing Over the Ice Barrier
desc: Tribute any number of "Ice Barrier" monsters; Special Summon from your Deck that many Level 4 or lower "Ice Barrier" monsters with different names from each other. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 of your "Ice Barrier" monsters that is banished or in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Winds Over the Ice Barrier" once per turn.
eff: Tribute any number of "Ice Barrier" monsters; Special Summon from your Deck that many Level 4 or lower "Ice Barrier" monsters with different names from each other. During your Main Phase, except the turn this card was sent to the GY: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 of your "Ice Barrier" monsters that is banished or in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Winds Over the Ice Barrier" once per turn.

action: Adds banished cards to the hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
